title: Payment Metadata
description: Schema for payment negotiation and verification in NACP messages.

method.description: The settlement method used for the task.

currency.description: Currency code or token symbol (e.g., USDC, SOL, BTC).

amount.description: The amount to be paid, represented as a string to avoid floating point issues.

transaction_id.description: Optional hash or reference to an on-chain or external transaction.
